profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Maxindo Karya Anugerah Tbk engages in the manufacture and sale of tropical roots-based snack food in Indonesia. It offers snack pellets, fried crackers, and fried chips. The company exports its products to Australia, Bahrain, Brunei Darussalam, Canada, China, Germany, Guam, Hong Kong, India, Japan, South Korea, Kuwait, Malaysia, Mauritius, Myanmar, the Netherlands, New Zealand, the Philippines, Poland, Qatar, Russia, Singapore, Suriname, Thailand, the United Arab Emirates, the United Kingdom, and the United States. The company was founded in 1977 and is based in Bogor, Indonesia.
